programs.name: El Salvador
programs.bitcoin_integration: Bitcoin is legal tender (voluntary acceptance after 2025 reforms). Strong government support for Bitcoin ecosystem, Lightning network adoption, and crypto businesses. No capital gains tax on Bitcoin in many cases. Excellent for Bitcoin-native identity experiments and residency.

finance.tax_benefits: Favorable crypto tax treatment; Bitcoin legal tender status provides strong sovereign signal. Potential residency pathways tied to economic contribution.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Direct Bitcoin payments accepted in many places. Government Bitcoin reserve and infrastructure. Ideal for MotoPass Bitcoin passport pilots.

programs.details: First country to make Bitcoin legal tender. Updated rules in 2025 for flexibility while remaining highly pro-Bitcoin. Strong fit for MotoPass sovereign passport and identity experiments.

pathways.label: Economic contribution residency
pathways.notes: Voluntary Bitcoin legal tender; pathways tied to economic activity and investment.

pathways.label: Bitcoin business establishment
pathways.notes: Strong fit for Lightning-native operators and crypto founders.

critical_tests.notes: Legal tender status; regional mobility via CA-4 for citizens.

legal_compliance.recent_changes: 2025 reforms shifted to voluntary merchant acceptance while retaining pro-Bitcoin posture.

common_questions: What are capital gains rules for BTC?
red_flags: Verify current reform details before structuring
optimization_tips: Use Lightning-first business footprint in San Salvador
paige_fields.escalate_when: Large corporate relocation or mining operations

programs.name: Central African Republic
programs.bitcoin_integration: Bitcoin legal tender since 2022. Focus on financial inclusion via Bitcoin. Growing interest in crypto infrastructure.

finance.tax_benefits: Bitcoin legal tender framework supports digital asset activity. Tax incentives for foreign investment in some cases.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Legal tender status enables direct Bitcoin use. Good testbed for MotoPass in emerging markets.

programs.details: Second country to adopt Bitcoin as legal tender. Focus on inclusion and sovereignty. Relevant for MotoPass global passport vision.

programs.name: Uruguay
programs.bitcoin_integration: Growing crypto-friendly environment. Stable democracy with interest in digital assets and fintech. Potential for Bitcoin residency incentives.

finance.tax_benefits: Territorial tax system attractive for high-net-worth. Crypto gains often favorably treated. Strong residency pathway.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Stable jurisdiction for Bitcoin holders. Good base for MotoPass Latin America hub.

programs.details: Popular for residency. High quality of life, stable politics, and increasing openness to crypto and remote workers. Excellent candidate for MotoPass Bitcoin residency program.

pathways.label: Real estate investment
pathways.notes: Beachfront and rural ownership widely permitted for foreigners.

pathways.label: Rentista / income proof
pathways.notes: ~$1,500/month sustained income — lower capital lock-up than RE route.

pathways.label: Bank deposit / bonds
pathways.notes: Passive investment equivalent; useful for BTC→fiat structuring.

critical_tests.notes: Mercosur mobility (~10 countries); visa-free ~170 after naturalization.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may own beachfront and rural land with few restrictions.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: 2025–2026 digital nomad and investor pathways streamlined.

common_questions: Can I keep foreign crypto gains tax-free?
red_flags: Income proof must be sustainable; apostille delays
optimization_tips: RE investment for faster approval; territorial tax for BTC gains

programs.name: Bolivia
programs.bitcoin_integration: Emerging interest in crypto. Regulatory environment evolving. Potential for Bitcoin-friendly policies in coming years.

finance.tax_benefits: Research needed on crypto tax treatment and investment incentives.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Monitor for policy shifts. Potential future MotoPass candidate in Andes region.

programs.details: User to fill detailed research, current finance numbers, Bitcoin friendliness, and status update.

pathways.label: Investor / company route
pathways.notes: Business establishment or capital investment — no pure CBI passport-for-donation program.

pathways.label: Low solvency / fixed deposit
pathways.notes: Budget stacking option via solvency proof — verify current SUPREME DECREE thresholds with counsel.

critical_tests.notes: Weaker passport mobility vs Uruguay; research dual nationality policy before committing.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Restrictions in border/security zones; urban RE often viable — legal review required.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: Crypto regulation evolving; monitor official gazette.

common_questions: Is there a golden passport program?
What is the solvency route minimum?
optimization_tips: Position as value/distressed stack leg, not primary hub
paige_fields.escalate_when: Land purchase near restricted zones or corporate restructuring

programs.name: St. Kitts and Nevis
programs.bitcoin_integration: One of the oldest and most respected CBI programs. Crypto-friendly in practice for high-net-worth applicants. Accepts digital asset investments in some cases.

finance.tax_benefits: No personal income, capital gains, or inheritance tax. Very attractive for Bitcoin holders.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Program accepts real estate or donation; some flexibility for crypto-sourced funds. Strong passport mobility.

programs.details: Premium Caribbean CBI. Excellent passport strength and tax neutrality. Top-tier for MotoPass Bitcoin sovereign citizens.

programs.name: Antigua and Barbuda
programs.bitcoin_integration: Well-regarded CBI program. Increasing openness to digital assets and fintech investors.

finance.tax_benefits: No capital gains or inheritance tax. Territorial elements attractive.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Good for Bitcoin-funded applications. Strong passport for travel.

programs.details: Solid Caribbean option with good reputation and Bitcoin holder friendliness.

programs.name: Dominica
programs.bitcoin_integration: Popular, cost-effective CBI. Accepts crypto in practice for qualified applicants.

finance.tax_benefits: No income or capital gains tax on foreign income for many applicants.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Affordable entry point with solid passport. Good MotoPass test case.

programs.details: One of the more accessible premium CBI programs. Strong value for Bitcoiners.

programs.name: UAE (Dubai / Abu Dhabi)
programs.bitcoin_integration: Extremely crypto-friendly free zones (VARA in Dubai). Zero personal income tax and capital gains on crypto. Major Bitcoin and Web3 hub. Lightning and on-chain activity welcomed.

finance.tax_benefits: 0% personal income tax, 0% capital gains on crypto. Golden Visa pathways via investment or business setup.
finance.bitcoin_specific: World-class for Bitcoin businesses and holders. VARA regulation provides clarity. Perfect MotoPass flagship jurisdiction.

programs.details: Top global crypto hub. Ideal base for MotoPass operations, Bitcoin company incorporation, and high-end residency.

pathways.label: Golden Visa (10-year)
pathways.notes: Property or investment threshold in AED equivalent; VARA clarity for crypto businesses.

pathways.label: Free zone company + residency
pathways.notes: Popular for Bitcoin/Web3 operators; zero personal income tax in many structures.

critical_tests.notes: UAE does not offer citizenship by investment; residency + tax efficiency is the play.

primary_laws: Federal Decree-Law on Entry and Residence
legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Freehold zones available for foreigners in designated areas.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: VARA framework strengthens crypto business licensing.

common_questions: Can I run a Bitcoin business from Dubai?
What is the golden visa property threshold?
red_flags: Free zone vs mainland entity choice matters
optimization_tips: VARA-licensed structure for crypto treasury; Lightning-friendly free zones
paige_fields.escalate_when: VARA licensing or $1M+ property golden visa

programs.name: Switzerland
programs.bitcoin_integration: Crypto Valley (Zug) is legendary. Clear regulation, strong rule of law, excellent banking for crypto. Many Bitcoin companies headquartered here. Residency possible via investment or business.

finance.tax_benefits: Favorable lump-sum taxation in some cantons for high-net-worth. Crypto treated as asset class with clarity.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Best-in-class infrastructure for Bitcoin companies and individuals. On-chain friendly. Top MotoPass European anchor.

programs.details: Gold standard for crypto jurisdiction. High quality of life and stability. Excellent for serious Bitcoin sovereigns.

pathways.label: Lump-sum taxation (negotiated)
pathways.notes: Canton-negotiated annual tax for wealthy residents — popular HNW pathway.

pathways.label: Company + director residency
pathways.notes: Crypto Valley (Zug) pathway for Bitcoin businesses and founders.

critical_tests.notes: Strong rule of law; naturalization is canton-specific and slow vs CBI jurisdictions.

primary_laws: Federal Act on Foreign Nationals and Integration
legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Permitted with cantonal restrictions for non-EU/EFTA in some cases.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: Crypto Valley continues as Bitcoin business hub; FINMA clarity for VASPs.

common_questions: Can I hold BTC in a Swiss entity?
Crypto Valley vs Zurich for founders?
red_flags: Citizenship takes years — plan for residency not passport
optimization_tips: Zug for Bitcoin treasury companies; lump-sum in low-tax cantons

programs.name: Singapore
programs.bitcoin_integration: Clear, balanced regulation (MAS). Strong fintech and crypto scene. Excellent infrastructure. Residency via investment or Global Investor Programme.

finance.tax_benefits: No capital gains tax. Territorial tax system. Very attractive for Bitcoin holders and funds.
finance.bitcoin_specific: World-class for Bitcoin trading, custody, and business. Strict but predictable. Strong MotoPass Asia base.

programs.details: Premier Asian hub. High trust, excellent connectivity, strong rule of law. Ideal for MotoPass regional headquarters.

programs.name: Portugal
programs.bitcoin_integration: Was very crypto-friendly (NHR regime). Recent changes to tax rules for crypto. Still attractive but monitor updates. Golden Visa evolving.

finance.tax_benefits: Changes in 2023-2025 reduced some benefits. Still territorial elements and quality of life high.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Monitor closely. Previously excellent; now more neutral. Good lifestyle option if rules stabilize.

programs.details: Lifestyle + residency strong, but tax/crypto policy has shifted. Requires fresh research for MotoPass.

pathways.label: Golden Visa (investment fund route)
pathways.notes: Fund route remains common post-housing reform; verify current eligible categories.

pathways.label: D7 passive income
pathways.notes: Lower capital pathway for remote income / pensioners — popular with Bitcoiners.

critical_tests.notes: EU Schengen access; citizenship after 5 years with Portuguese language requirement.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Permitted; golden visa real estate route restricted/reformed — verify current rules.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: Housing-route golden visa largely closed; funds and business routes remain.

common_questions: Is the housing golden visa still available?
How does NHR tax status interact with BTC?
red_flags: Policy shifted 2023–2024 — confirm eligible investment category
optimization_tips: D7 for lower capital; fund route for EU stackers

programs.name: Malta
programs.bitcoin_integration: Crypto-friendly EU member with clear licensing (MFSA). Good for Bitcoin businesses seeking EU passporting. Residency options available.

finance.tax_benefits: Favorable corporate tax regime. Crypto licensing clarity.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Strong for regulated Bitcoin activity in EU. Good MotoPass EU bridge.

programs.details: Solid EU option with crypto regulation maturity. Useful for MotoPass compliance and passport mobility.

programs.name: Panama
programs.bitcoin_integration: Territorial tax system. Crypto generally treated favorably. Popular with Bitcoiners and digital nomads. Friendly residency programs.

finance.tax_benefits: Territorial taxation — foreign income often not taxed. Very attractive for Bitcoin holders.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Popular Bitcoin jurisdiction in practice. Good cost-to-benefit for MotoPass LatAm strategy.

programs.details: Strong territorial tax + crypto friendly in practice. Excellent value residency option.

programs.name: Georgia
programs.bitcoin_integration: Very crypto-friendly policies in recent years. Low taxes, fast residency, growing Bitcoin scene. Attractive for digital asset holders.

finance.tax_benefits: Low flat tax, territorial elements, crypto often favorably treated.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Fast, low-cost, crypto-positive. Strong emerging MotoPass candidate for Europe/Asia corridor.

programs.details: Rising star for Bitcoiners seeking fast, affordable, friendly jurisdiction. High potential.

programs.name: Paraguay
programs.bitcoin_integration: Low taxes, crypto interest growing. Territorial tax system attractive. Bitcoin mining and adoption increasing.

finance.tax_benefits: Low tax jurisdiction. Potential for crypto incentives.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Watch for Bitcoin mining and adoption growth. Good cost-effective LatAm option.

programs.details: Emerging low-tax friendly jurisdiction. Add detailed finance and Bitcoin notes from latest research.

programs.name: Costa Rica
programs.bitcoin_integration: Territorial tax, growing crypto adoption, popular with nomads.

finance.tax_benefits: Territorial elements
finance.bitcoin_specific: Nomad-friendly, Lightning cafes in San José

programs.details: Stable democracy, territorial tax appeal, rising Bitcoin community.

programs.name: Hong Kong
programs.bitcoin_integration: Major Asian finance hub, clear SFC crypto licensing framework.

finance.tax_benefits: Low tax territory
finance.bitcoin_specific: Licensed exchanges, institutional BTC custody

programs.details: Gateway to Asia capital markets with maturing crypto regulation.

programs.name: Thailand
programs.bitcoin_integration: Elite visa and LTR programs, growing crypto scene in Bangkok.

finance.tax_benefits: Territorial for foreign income
finance.bitcoin_specific: LTR visa popular with Bitcoiners

programs.details: Lifestyle + residency combo with improving crypto clarity.

programs.name: Mexico
programs.bitcoin_integration: Temporary and permanent residency paths, active Bitcoin community.

finance.tax_benefits: Territorial for non-Mexico income
finance.bitcoin_specific: Bitcoin circular economies in CDMX and beach towns

programs.details: Accessible North American residency with territorial tax benefits.

programs.name: Cyprus
programs.bitcoin_integration: EU member, non-dom regime, growing fintech sector.

finance.tax_benefits: Non-dom 17 years
finance.bitcoin_specific: EU passport path, crypto service providers licensed

programs.details: EU access with non-dom tax optimization for HNW.

programs.name: Greece
programs.bitcoin_integration: Golden visa real estate route, EU Schengen access.

finance.tax_benefits: Non-dom available
finance.bitcoin_specific: EU mobility, monitor crypto tax rules

programs.details: Golden visa EU access at competitive thresholds.

programs.name: Vanuatu
programs.bitcoin_integration: Fast CBI program, accepts crypto payments in practice.

finance.tax_benefits: No income tax
finance.bitcoin_specific: Fast passport, Bitcoin-friendly agents

programs.details: One of fastest citizenship-by-investment programs globally.

programs.name: Turkey
programs.bitcoin_integration: Citizenship via real estate, large Bitcoin trading volume.

finance.tax_benefits: Monitor crypto tax

programs.details: Citizenship via property with bridge geography.

finance.tax_benefits: Territorial tax
finance.bitcoin_specific: FSC crypto sandbox

programs.details: African hub with territorial taxation and premium visa.

finance.tax_benefits: No CGT
finance.bitcoin_specific: Offshore structures common

programs.details: Island jurisdiction with favorable offshore framework.

description: MotoPass Sovereign Residency & Citizenship Programs Tracker. Bitcoin-native passports and jurisdictional stacking research. Single source of truth data file. Edit this JSON to update the live site. Statuses: 'Acquired', 'Researching', 'Approved', 'To be filled'.
bitcoin_focus: Prioritize programs with strong Bitcoin/crypto friendliness, Lightning payment options, favorable tax treatment for digital assets, and sovereign identity compatibility.
